brand_dna.category: Australian water filtration brand selling home water filters, coolers, whole-house systems and sparkling/soda taps.
brand_dna.core_belief: Clean, better-tasting water is a home essential, not a luxury - Awesome Water aims to make premium filtration accessible with removal of contaminants down to forever chemicals.
proof_points: Registered Awesome Water® trademark across full product range
Price Beat Guarantee stated in site navigation
Forever Chemicals Removal range and fluoride filtration bundles
Physical retail and service presence in 10+ Australian cities including Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Brisbane and Adelaide
24 Hour Help Line and Repair Manual for support
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, full-range home filtration specialist that competes on price with a Price Beat Guarantee and deep local (Australian) service coverage.

voice_pillars.name: Confident and Bold
voice_pillars.desc: Makes strong category-leader claims and is not shy about ranking itself at the top.
voice_pillars.quote: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

voice_pillars.name: Value-Assured
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on guarantees and deals to reassure buyers they are getting the best price.

voice_pillars.name: Complete and Practical
voice_pillars.desc: Frames itself as an all-in-one home solution, speaking in plain functional product language.

voice_pillars.name: Locally Supportive
voice_pillars.desc: Emphasises Australian coverage and easy access to help and repairs.

phrases: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

icp: Health-conscious Australian homeowners who want cleaner, better-tasting tap water and value a proven full-range brand with local service and a best-price guarantee.

personas.name: Chemical-Wary Parent
personas.description: A family buyer worried about fluoride and forever chemicals in tap water, moved by contaminant-removal proof and safety framing.

personas.name: Value-Hunting Homeowner
personas.description: A practical shopper comparing prices who is won over by the Price Beat Guarantee and showroom/sale pricing.

personas.name: Convenience Seeker
personas.description: A buyer who wants instant hot, cold and sparkling water at home, moved by 3-in-1 all-in-one dispenser features.

offers: Showroom / SALE pricing on selected units (e.g. Soda Tap 3 in 1)
1 Year Fluoride Filtration Bundle - Special Offer

allowed.claim: Range designed for forever chemicals removal
allowed.source: New Product Range - Forever Chemicals Removal

allowed.claim: Complete home filtration including whole-house systems
24 Hour Help Line and Repair Manual available
Local service and retail across multiple Australian cities
3 in 1 hot/cold and ice maker dispenser functionality

banned.claim: Calling the product 'eco-friendly' or 'sustainable' without specific backing
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim

banned.claim: Saying the filters are 'zero impact' or 'carbon neutral'
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - requires specific, verifiable backing not present on site

banned.claim: Claiming water 'cures', 'treats' or 'relieves' any health condition
banned.why: Prohibited medical claim - no clinical evidence on site

banned.claim: Stating the filter removes '100%' of contaminants without test data
banned.why: Unsubstantiated absolute claim - no verifiable figures provided

banned.claim: 'No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market' used in ads without substantiation
banned.why: Comparative superiority claim needs evidence to run in paid media
